title: Justice
quote: Let justice roll down like waters, and righteousness like a mighty stream.
meaning: God requires fairness and righteousness in society, not just outward worship.
application: Followers of God are called to defend the poor and act justly in daily life.

title: Repentance
meaning: True worship requires turning away from sin.
application: Repentance is an ongoing process of returning to God.

title: Judgment
application: God’s justice is real and cannot be ignored.

title: Hope & Restoration
quote: I will restore the fortunes of my people Israel.
meaning: God always leaves room for redemption.
application: Even after judgment, God offers restoration.
